requirements.task_name: Choose the cheapest monthly plan under $40 that supports at least 3 chatbots with analytics
requirements.task_description: Select a pricing plan that costs less than or equal to $40 per month, allows managing at least 3 separate chatbots, and explicitly includes conversation analytics, then start the signup flow for that plan.

requirements.task_name: Create a new customer support chatbot for an online store using an e-commerce template
requirements.task_description: Use the templates gallery to create a new chatbot named "Store Support Bot" based on a template labeled for e-commerce customer support, and set its primary language and greeting message.

requirements.task_name: Add three FAQ entries to the chatbot knowledge base for shipping, returns, and order status
requirements.task_description: Configure the knowledge base for an existing chatbot by adding exactly three FAQ articles: one for shipping time, one for return policy, and one for order status checks, and assign each to the appropriate category.

requirements.task_name: Customize the chat widget’s appearance with a specific color and position
requirements.task_description: Adjust the chatbot widget so it uses a custom brand color, appears in the bottom-right corner, and shows a specific header title before saving the appearance settings.

requirements.task_name: Set up business hours routing so daytime chats go to the Sales team and others stay with the bot
requirements.task_description: Create a routing rule that sends chats received Monday through Friday between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM to a "Sales" team, while keeping all other times handled by the bot only, then enable the rule.

requirements.task_name: Enable and configure a lead capture flow that collects name, email, and company
requirements.task_description: Turn on lead capture in the chatbot and configure a short form that asks for full name (required), email (required), and company (optional), ensuring the fields appear in that order in the conversation.

requirements.task_name: Review analytics to find the day last month with the highest average messages per conversation
requirements.task_description: Filter conversation analytics to the previous calendar month, sort by average messages per conversation per day, and open the details for the day with the highest average.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getDailyAnalyticsSummaries(startDate, endDate, chatbotId) is called with startDate and endDate exactly matching the start_date and end_date of the 'previous_month' preset returned by getAnalyticsDateRangePresets().
required_variables.reason: Tracks that the user actually filtered analytics to the entire previous calendar month, including the exact range and optional chatbot filter, allowing the evaluator to verify correct date-range filtering rather than just any analytics view.

required_variables.set_condition: When getDailyAnalyticsDetail(dailySummaryId) is called and the referenced summary exists and corresponds to a day within the previous calendar month AND its average_messages_per_conversation is equal to the maximum average_messages_per_conversation among all summaries in daily_analytics_summaries that fall within that same previous calendar month (ties allowed).
required_variables.reason: Captures that the user opened the detail view for a day that is actually the top day by average messages per conversation in the previous calendar month. Combined with task7_prevMonthFilterParams, this lets the evaluator confirm both correct time-range filtering and selection of the correct top day.

requirements.task_name: Add two team members with different roles and assign one to a chatbot
requirements.task_description: Create two new team member accounts, assigning one the "Admin" role and the other the "Editor" (or similar lower) role, then assign the Editor to manage a specific chatbot.
